spain.summary: Moderate structural stability within EU framework. Predictable regulatory system with rising tax transparency exposure and gradual fiscal tightening.

portugal.summary: Relatively stable mobility environment with evolving tax incentives and moderate policy recalibration following NHR reforms.

france.summary: High regulatory density with strong institutional stability. Elevated tax complexity and social policy rigidity increase compliance exposure.

montenegro.summary: Emerging jurisdiction with flexible entry pathways but elevated geopolitical sensitivity and evolving EU-alignment risks.

thailand.summary: Accessible mobility hub with periodic visa policy shifts and moderate political volatility. Regulatory shifts tend to be episodic rather than systemic.

vietnam.summary: Rapidly developing jurisdiction with controlled regulatory framework and higher structural unpredictability for foreign capital and residency pathways.

united states.summary: Strong institutional framework with high regulatory density. Elevated compliance complexity and tax exposure for global income holders.

new zealand.summary: High institutional stability with relatively predictable regulatory environment. Geographic isolation reduces geopolitical volatility exposure.
